items.html: At first, when there was made in her Yesod only one door, one hinge, and one MaNTzePaCh, by means of ZA [Zeir Anpin], the female is then called Na'ar ["youth," spelled] lacking the Heh — for Na'ar in Gematria is 320 [ShaCh] Dinim [judgments], and this first MaNTzePaCh was Dinim, as above. And now that she has taken these second ones — that is, after she was sawn apart [Nesirah] — the Heh of Na'arah [maiden] is added to her, for this Heh alludes to those five letters of the second MaNTzePaCh, which are more Rachamim [mercy] and sweetened Gevurot.
